{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Fang
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Communication for dolls is harder if the bearer has a different [[Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
